UHA-32  WELDING REQUIREMENTS FOR HIGH ALLOY STEELS. (a) Welding of high alloy steel vessels shall be performed using procedures qualified in accordance with QW-200, with the additional variables specified in UHA-21. (b) Filler metals shall produce deposits compatible with the base metal and shall comply with QW-404. (c) Interpass temperature shall not exceed the limits specified in this paragraph. Postweld heat treatment shall be performed as required by UHA-34. Examination of welds shall be in accordance with UHA-51. For general welding requirements, see UW-14 and UW-26. Welders shall be qualified per QW-300.
